Freeway Bar (Highway Bar) - Chrome - Softail
Made from stout 1-1/2" diameter thick-wall steel with heavy-duty welded flanges
Constructed for strength and long lasting good looks
Offers plenty of foot room around floorboards and foot controls
Provides alternative platform upon which to stretch out and rest your feet
Highway bars are designed for appearance only and may provide only a small amount of protection for the motorcycle. They are not intended to provide bodily protection in any circumstance.
Made in the U.S.A.

Freeway Bar (Highway Bar) - Black - CMX500 Rebel
Size appropriate and includes all the mounting hardware required for easy installation

RPT Air Intake Kit - Chrome - Softail
Same internal components as the Cobra Powerflo air intake, with the outside cover replaced with a machined aluminum industrial-looking frame that echoes Cobra's popular Race Pro mufflers
High-flow K&N® air filter element ensures the best air intake and maximum protection for your engine
Includes all the fasteners, seals, backing plate and mounting hardware to make for an easy installation
Formed stainless steel mesh insert keeps out bugs and debris
Unique internal venturi design promotes maximum airflow
Made in the USA
RPT Air Intake Kit - Chrome/Black - Softail
Same internal components as the Cobra Powerflo air intake, with the outside cover replaced with a machined aluminum industrial-looking frame that echoes Cobra's popular Race Pro mufflers
High-flow K&N® air filter element ensures the best air intake and maximum protection for your engine
Includes all the fasteners, seals, backing plate and mounting hardware to make for an easy installation
Formed stainless steel mesh insert keeps out bugs and debris
Unique internal venturi design promotes maximum airflow
Made in the USA
Cone Air Intake Kit - Chrome - Softail
The ram-air style snorkel ensures you get the most out of your motor
Unique air filter design flows better than stock/competing units
Designed with maximum performance in mind
Includes lasered and folded shield
Orients the K&N filter forward
Simple bolt-on installation
Trunk Guard Bumper - Freewheeler
This bumper is a simple bolt-on upgrade for your Freewheeler trike
It uses laser-cut brackets, for a precision fit and finish
The bumper's graceful bend follows the trike's lower trunk curve for an OEM look and fit
The bumper itself is chrome plated, while the lower mounting brackets are powder-coated black

Swept Floorboards - Driver - VT1300
Custom-look swept design will make any bike stand out in a crowd
Quick and painless installation - all kits bolt right on
More leg room
Outstanding vibration isolation
Classic American looks
Front kits are chrome-plated stamped steel
Made in the USA
Speedster Slashdown Exhaust - Chrome - '86-'06 Softail
Cobra's Speedster systems combine traditional styling and modern performance technology
These shotgun pipes also produce class-leading power gains
In part, the power gains come from the Cobra PowerPort, their proprietary crossover technology that helps to increase overall power from idle to redline
Delivers the kind of power increase you normally experience with a 2:1 system, while retaining the clean classic lines of a 2:2 pipe
Full-length, 222° heat shields
Speedster Slashdown Exhaust - Chrome - '91-'05 Dyna
Cobra's Speedster systems combine traditional styling and modern performance technology
These shotgun pipes also produce class-leading power gains
In part, the power gains come from the Cobra PowerPort, their proprietary crossover technology that helps to increase overall power from idle to redline
Delivers the kind of power increase you normally experience with a 2:1 system, while retaining the clean classic lines of a 2:2 pipe
Full-length, 222° heat shields
Power Pro HP Exhaust - '86-'06 Softail
Design features a sleek, cylindrical 3-1/2" muffler body in addition to the megaphone style of the original PowerPro
Delicately machined chromed billet tip
Internal cooling technology for non-bluing muffler body
Double-insulated body
Removable baffle
Made in the U.S.A.

True Dual Headpipes - Chrome - '95-'06 FL
Features one-piece, full length, 2.5-inch-diameter heat shields
Cobra designed these pipes to deliver optimal torque and power while increasing the stock bike’s rideability
Includes head pipes and heat shields and all the mounting hardware required
1.75" diameter ensures the stock mufflers and most aftermarket mufflers will fit
Does not include mufflers.

Speedster Swept Short Exhaust - Black - '07-'11 Softail
A real work of metallurgical art, the high sweeping lines of these pipes are truly breathtaking
Like Cobra's flagship Speedsters, the Swepts also include Cobra’s PowerPort, which gives them 2-into-1 power while maintaining the great 2-into-2 look
Features full-length, 2.5-inch heat shields covering 1.75-inch headpipes

Speedster RPT Short Exhaust
Speedster Short exhaust with Race Pro Tips (RPT) make use of all of the high-tech features of regular 2.5-inch Speedster systems
The tips mimic the Race Pro machined design, and are held in place with 12-point bolts
The RPT designation comes from adapting the design from the Race Pro 4-inch muffler into this full system
Uses the PowerPort for increased power and uses 1.75-inch constant velocity cores for exceptional sound and performance
The 2.5-inch heat shields expand to 2.75-inches at the end
Speedster Swept Short Exhaust - Black - '14-'20 XL
A real work of metallurgical art, the high sweeping lines of these pipes are truly breathtaking
Like Cobra's flagship Speedsters, the Swepts also include Cobra’s PowerPort, which gives them 2-into-1 power while maintaining the great 2-into-2 look
Features full-length, 2.5-inch heat shields covering 1.75-inch headpipes
The installation of this system requires the removal of the stock right-side passenger foot rest
True Dual Exhaust - Billet Tip - '12-'17 Softail
The Cobra Bad Hombre Dual exhaust system gives that classic dual exit look, while increasing performance
1.75" exhaust tubing provides improved exhaust flow, and the 2.5" heat shields give the classic straight pipe look
Removable louvered baffles increase back-pressure and torque, as well as soften this exhaust system’s bark
Includes oxygen sensor bungs
True Dual Headpipes - Black - '95-'06 FL
Features one-piece, full length, 2.5-inch-diameter heat shields
Cobra designed these pipes to deliver optimal torque and power while increasing the stock bike’s rideability
Includes head pipes and heat shields and all the mounting hardware required
1.75" diameter ensures the stock mufflers and most aftermarket mufflers will fit
Does not include mufflers.
Streetrod Slashdown Exhaust
Hot Rod simplicity with Speedster style
Large 2.5", 222° heat shields fit from the exhaust ports to the chrome billet tips for a seamless look and non-bluing finish
Gives overall power increase with improved rideability
Easy installation with all mounting hardware included
Made in the U.S.A.
True Dual Exhaust - Straight Cut - Nomad 1500/1600
This true dual system increases the performance over the stock machine while also dropping more than a few unwanted pounds
Complete with full-length 2.5" heatshields that do not turn blue
Muffler bodies have proprietary technology to prevent blueing
Deep but quiet sound
Highly polished chromed billet tips are the stylish finish to the classic muffler body
Made in the U.S.A.

Cobra's drag pipes have the pure, simple lines riders want, and they come with their removable power cores

Powerport Headpipes - Chrome - '10-'16 Bagger
PowerPort Dual Headpipes make use of Cobra's strategically located PowerPort cross over to deliver 2-into-1 power with the look of a traditional dual system
Fattens the low-end and mid-range torque curve; perfect for touring and highway use
Includes headpipes, PowerPort cross under section, heat shields and all of the mounting hardware needed
Mufflers not included
Designed to be used with stock O2 sensors
Neighbor Hater Muffler - Black
3" muffler bodies morphs to 3-1/4" at the rear
2" constant-velocity cores for exceptional sound and performance, as well as the bonded E-glass and stainless steel mesh
Sold in pairs
Made in the U.S.A.
Powerport Dual Headpipes - Chrome
Designed specifically for HD trike models, these headpipes are a direct bolt on for both Freewheeler and Tri Glide models
Has the “S” bends built into the pipe, eliminating the need for aftermarket adapters
Cobra® PowerPort crossover performs like a true 2-into-1 headpipe with the clean look of a traditional dual system
Fattens the low end and mid-range torque curve; perfect for touring and highway use
Includes oxygen sensor bungs
Bronze Tip Slip-On Muffler - Rebel
Machined aluminum bronze tip with matching laser cut bronze steel Cobra logo
Uses louvered cores for enhanced performance and improved sound
Noticeable increase in sound quality over the stock muffler
4" diameter black power-coated megaphone body
Made in California
50-State legal
VN1700 Billet Tip Mufflers
These 4-inch slip-on mufflers are a simple solution for a touch of custom look without a custom price or effort
These beautiful slip-ons are capped off with massive chromed billet tips
Features proprietary technology to prevent bluing, making these slip-ons virtually blue proof
3" Mufflers - '10-'16 VT1300
Chromed billet tips can be located in three positions: slash cut, slash down and one in between
Replaceable, 2" baffles come standard and they use a constant velocity design for improved performance
Baffle also uses a high-density bonded e-glass sleeve and stainless steel mesh, which contributes to a better acoustic quality
Though the baffles work to reduce the tone and volume, they also contribute to the power gains from the mufflers
For models that use a cross-over on the stock system, Cobra slip-ons include a similar OEM-style balance tube to increase overall performance
Fits stock head pipes
4" Slip-On Muffler - Black - '11-'17 Stryker
Increase horsepower and torque with a deeper, more aggressive exhaust note
Welded from mild steel then bathed in a four-step chrome-plating process
4" muffler body uses a cooling chamber with proprietary technology to prevent blueing
Feature scalloped chromed billet tips
All necessary mounting hardware and instructions included, ensuring problem-free installation
Made in the U.S.A.
6-6 Mufflers - Black
Emphasizes the six cylinders that power the classic Gold Wing engine
Features three separate bodies on each side giving the bike six pipes total; each of the three muffler bodies measures 2-1/4" in diameter
Each of the three pipes on each muffler ties into a three-into-one collector
The gigantic, clover-leaf shaped collector locks each tube into perfect position, while a system of unseen brackets ties the pipes together at the rear
Designed so each pipe's arched bend matches the bike's bags, creating perfect visual symmetry
While louder than stock, they are still well within acceptable sound levels
Made in the U.S.A.
Uses stock heat shields.
Black Muffler
Features advanced acoustical tuning technologies for deep rumbling sounds
4" round muffler front expands to 4.5" diameter near the rear

Comes with a 3" core encased in proprietary Cobra sound-tuning materials with specific acoustical dampening and thermal insulation properties; deep bass notes are made possible because of class-leading resonance absorption and prevention
Satin black muffler includes a custom heat shield to smooth transition from stock headpipes to Cobra muffler
Matte titanium finish on aluminum tip matches stock heat shields
Tip features seven, 12-point bolts that provide the dished tip a distinctive, almost aircraft quality look

Backrest Kit - 14" - Chrome - Softail
A detachable backrest offers the best of both worlds for a rider
Allows you to easily remove and install the backrest onto your bike in a matter of seconds

Does NOT require the relocation of turn signals.

Cobra's Speedster systems combine traditional styling and modern performance technology
These shotgun pipes also produce class-leading power gains

Delivers the kind of power increase you normally experience with a 2:1 system, while retaining the clean classic lines of a 2:2 pipe

True Dual Exhaust - Fishtail - '07-'11 Softail
The Cobra Bad Hombre Dual exhaust system gives that classic dual exit look, while increasing performance

Includes oxygen sensor bungs
Chrome Slashcut Mufflers
Chromed billet tips can be located in three positions: slash cut, slash down and one in between
Replaceable, 2" baffles come standard and they use a constant velocity design for improved performance
Baffle also uses a high-density bonded e-glass sleeve and stainless steel mesh, which contributes to a better acoustic quality
Though the baffles work to reduce the tone and volume, they also contribute to the power gains from the mufflers
For models that use a cross-over on the stock system, Cobra slip-ons include a similar OEM-style balance tube to increase overall performance
Fits stock head pipes
Chrome Slashcut Mufflers
Great performance, price and sound are the hallmarks of these 3-inch mufflers
They come with 2-inch replaceable baffles, and chromed billet tips that can be located in three positions: slash cut, slash down and one in between
Constant velocity baffle design for improved performance
Baffles use a high-density bonded fiberglass wrap and stainless steel mesh, which contributes to a better sound quality
Mufflers use the stock mounts and fit the stock head pipes
3" Mufflers - Chrome - '95-'16 Bagger
These 3-inch slip-on mufflers offer performance and style without breaking the bank
The 2-inch core, surrounded with a special e-glass packing and a stainless-steel mesh screen, offers the best performance and sound quality available in a 3-inch diameter muffler body
Tips can be mounted in one of three positions
Chrome Slashcut Mufflers
Offer a way for riders to customize their bikes without breaking the bank

Power Flo Mufflers for '95-'16 FL - Chrome
4.5-inch body tapers to 4-inch round at the front
4.5-inch machined aluminum, thin-line tip
3-inch high-flow core for superior performance
Acoustical engineering developments allow an incredibly deep sound because of intense, class-leading resonance absorption and prevention
Uses proprietary materials with specific acoustical dampening and thermal insulation properties
The frequency and location of the perforation patterns in the cores creates significant sound scattering in the mid frequencies, which helps to enhance the low frequency tones
3" RPT Mufflers - Chrome

The RPT slip-ons make use of all of the high-tech features of Cobra's regular 3" slip-on mufflers, including 2" constant velocity cores for exceptional sound and performance, as well as the bonded e-glass and stainless steel mesh
The RPT designation comes from adapting the design from Cobra's Race-Pro 4" muffler into this three-inch size
The bodies begin as 3" at the front until they expand to 3.5" inches at the rear
The tip uses the Race-Pro machined design that's held in place with 12-point bolts

Pro Chamber Headpipes - Chrome
For the Milwaukee Eight motor, Cobra modified their PowerPort by enlarging it to become a pulse chamber that accelerates exhaust scavenging to produce the kind of power riders expect
The round shape, bulging from between the heat shields gives a clue to the real power potential it offers
Stock H-D mufflers will not work with this head pipe because of the stock muffler’s internal construction. Most aftermarket mufflers will fit
909 Speedster Short Exhaust System - Chrome
The 909 Speedsters have a unique blend of performance, sound, and style
Like all of Cobra's Speedsters, these feature the PowerPort cross over which delivers class-leading power; which is a critical feature when using such a short system
Uses the same internal construction as Cobra's short RPT system so you also enjoy the same premium sound
Rolled tips give a brawny look that is matched by the sound
Mufflers expand from 3" at the front to 3-1/2" at the rear.

2-into-1 El Diablo Exhaust System - Chrome - 4"
Uses equal-length exhaust headers
One-of-a-kind Collector that is placed in front of the footpeg; This design is the most efficient mating of exhaust gases to help generate more power
Rear cylinder header pipe runs forward and wraps around the ignition cover for a sleek look and more clearance for the oil dip stick
Heat shields cover the exhaust headers and the collector nestles beneath a simple cover
Made in the U.S.A.

Neighbor Hater Mufflers for '95-'16 Bagger - Chrome
Neighbor Haters are not for the faint of heart
These are an aggressive slip-on muffler, for those who think loud just isn't good enough
Start as round 4-inch tubes, then bell out to 4.5-inches, for an aggressive and classic design at the rear
Internally, these mufflers have a spun and louvered baffle, but only for 8-inches; This is done in order to produce an aggressive, bark
At the end of the baffle is a trumpet shaped inner tip that works in harmony with the belled end, creating a unique look

3" Slashcut Slip-On Mufflers - XL - Black
Offer a way for riders to customize their bikes without breaking the bank
Chromed billet tips can be located in three positions: slash cut, slash down and one in between
Replaceable, 2" baffles come standard and they use a constant velocity design for improved performance
Baffle also uses a high-density bonded e-glass sleeve and stainless steel mesh, which contributes to a better acoustic quality
Though the baffles work to reduce the tone and volume, they also contribute to the power gains from the mufflers
For models that use a cross-over on the stock system, Cobra slip-ons include a similar OEM-style balance tube to increase overall performance
Fits stock head pipes

909 Slip-On Mufflers for FL - Black
The rear is finished with a rolled scalloped tip, not a simple slash cut
The rolled tip is matched with an inner core finished with the same scalloped cut

Race Pro Mufflers - Chrome - FL
The Race Pro’s unique black clam shell mounting bracket sets it apart from other mufflers
Mounts the same way as nearly every slip-on muffler from Cobra
Its look gets even better with a thin-line tip that’s held in place with seven, 12-point zinc plated bolts
Come with 3-inch cores encased in proprietary Cobra sound tuning materials with specific acoustical dampening and thermal insulation properties
The basso profondo notes are made possible because of class-leading resonance absorption and prevention
The frequency and location of the perforation patterns in the high-flo cores creates significant sound scattering in the mid frequencies, which helps to enhance the low frequency tones

El Diablo Exhaust - Chrome - 4"

Neighbor Hater Mufflers for '95-'16 Bagger - Black
Neighbor Haters are not for the faint of heart
These are an aggressive slip-on muffler, for those who think loud just isn't good enough
Start as round 4-inch tubes, then bell out to 4.5-inches, for an aggressive and classic design at the rear
Internally, these mufflers have a spun and louvered baffle, but only for 8-inches; This is done in order to produce an aggressive, bark
At the end of the baffle is a trumpet shaped inner tip that works in harmony with the belled end, creating a unique look
